# Caching.HasBothOrNeitherCacheHints method

Returns `true` when a result object carries BOTH caching-hint fields, or NEITHER. A server MUST NOT emit exactly one without the other. Mirrors TS `hasBothOrNeitherCacheHints`. (R-13.1-g)

```csharp
public static bool HasBothOrNeitherCacheHints(JsonObject result)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| result | The raw result object. |

## Return Value

`true` when both or neither hint field is present.
